remarks: Rarely offered and just moments from the heart of New Canaan, this beautifully renovated three-bedroom residence offers exceptional comfort, convenience, and timeless style. Set in the intimate Oenoke Lane community, the home has been extensively renovated and thoughtfully improved over the years, creating spaces that feel both elegant and effortless. A desirable end unit with an east-west orientation, the home is filled with natural light and enjoys exceptional privacy, enhanced by protected Land Trust property directly across the street. Sunlight fills the gracious living and dining rooms, while the beautifully reimagined kitchen serves as the heart of the home, featuring quartzite countertops, custom cabinetry, banquette seating, Wolf, Bosch and Sub-Zero appliances, and radiant heated floor. Sliders from the living room, dining room, and kitchen open to a private terrace, creating a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living. A private elevator provides access to all three levels. Upstairs, the primary suite features a custom dressing area, built-in workspace, and beautifully renovated bath with radiant heated floor. An additional bedroom offers flexibility for guests, family, or office space, while the lower-level bedroom includes built-ins and an en-suite bath with radiant heated floor, ideal for guests or a private retreat. PLEASE NOTE TAXES LISTED ABOVE ($26,201) ARE FOR 145 AND 147 OENOKE LANE COMBINED. QUARTERLY ASSOCIATION FEE INCLUDES TAXES.
